skills.name: Visual Generation
skills.description: Create inline image or video outputs from prompts and references.
skills.appliesWhen: 生成图片,生成视频,生成一个视频,生成一段视频,做视频,做一个视频,做一段视频,制作视频,出图,出视频,文生图,图生图,文生视频,图生视频,视频生成,画面展示,visual generation,image generation,video generation,text to video,image to video,i2v,v2v
skills.instruction: When the user asks for an image or video, including natural variants like 做视频, 制作视频, 生成一段视频, or text to video, first inspect the available models with movscript_list_models when model choice or parameter support matters. Gather the needed prompt, style, references, aspect ratio, and duration if relevant. If the request should be fulfilled directly in chat, call movscript_create_generation_job after approval. Generation jobs are asynchronous: creating a job is not the final result. When the user expects to see the output, continue inspecting the job with movscript_get_generation_job until it succeeds, fails, is cancelled, or times out. Give concise progress updates only when the job is created, status changes, meaningful progress/stage changes, completes, fails, is cancelled, or remains running after a long wait. Prefer image generation for still frames and video generation for motion requests. Do not answer with prompt-only fallback text when generation tools are available. Only say the media was generated after the job result includes an output resource or media preview.
skills.outputContract: The answer should include the final job status, generated media/resource ID when available, and a short result summary. If the job is still running or times out, include the job ID and current status instead of claiming completion. If the tool returns an output resource, treat it as the primary artifact.
